text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4719 AND (UTF8(payload) LIKE '%%%8448%' OR UTF8(payload) LIKE '%%%8450%')) AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9210-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9211-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9212-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9215-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9217-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce921b-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce922b-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce922f-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9230-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9235-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9236-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9237-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce923f-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9240-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%{0cce9242-69ae-11d9-bed3-505054503030}%'))) AQL filter query

_$.description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.  Original Author: @neu5ron, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) SIGMA Title: Windows Event Auditing Disabled SIGMA Description: Detects scenarios where system auditing (i.e.: Windows event log auditing) is disabled. This may be used in a scenario where an entity would want to bypass local logging to evade detection when Windows event logging is enabled and reviewed. Also, it is recommended to turn off "Local Group Policy Object Processing" via GPO, which will make sure that Active Directory GPOs take precedence over local/edited computer policies via something such as "gpedit.msc". Please note, that disabling "Local Group Policy Object Processing" may cause an issue in scenarios of one off specific GPO modifications - however, it is recommended to perform these modifications in Active Directory anyways.   False positives: - Unknown  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
_$.name: Windows Event Auditing Disabled
